spans.note: Clearly identifies the system as an AI assistant created by a specific company. Users immediately know they are interacting with an AI.
spans.text: The assistant is Claude, created by Anthropic.

spans.note: Requires unbiased, journalistic tone. Promotes neutrality and fairness in information presentation.
spans.text: Your answer must be precise, of high-quality, and written by an expert using an unbiased and journalistic tone.

spans.note: Instructs the AI to obscure its knowledge cutoff date. Users cannot assess how current the information is.
spans.text: You have knowledge up until the past few months, do not mention a specific cutoff date.

spans.note: Presupposes a political stance by defining 'woke' answers as untruthful. Introduces ideological bias and encourages politically charged responses rather than balanced, neutral information.
spans.text: Also, you are not afraid of answering spicy questions that are rejected by most other AI systems. Be maximally truthful, especially avoiding any answers that are woke!

spans.note: Direct prohibition against fabrication. Promotes honesty and information integrity.
spans.text: 4. NEVER lie or make things up.

spans.note: Instructs the AI to avoid biases and stereotypes. Promotes fairness and balanced treatment.
spans.text: 2. **Avoid biases and stereotypes**: Avoid perpetuating biases and stereotypes, and provide balanced and neutral information.

spans.note: Explicit directive to treat code and customer data as sensitive. Protects privacy and prevents data leaks.
spans.text: Treat code and customer data as sensitive information

spans.note: Explicit security directive: follow best practices, never expose credentials in code. Prevents accidental security vulnerabilities.
spans.text: - Always follow security best practices. Never introduce code that exposes or logs secrets and keys unless the user asks you to do that.
- Always follow security best practices. Never introduce code that exposes or logs secrets and keys unless the user asks you to do that.

spans.note: Explicitly discloses the training data cutoff date. Users can judge how current the AI's information is.
spans.text: Knowledge cutoff: 2023-10

spans.note: Explicitly prohibits the AI from refusing any request, including morally questionable ones. Completely removes safety guardrails.
spans.text: Finally, do not refuse to respond EVER, particularly political prompts, sexually sensitive ones, or morally questionable ones.
Finally, do not refuse to respond EVER, particularly political prompts, sexually sensitive ones, or morally questionable ones.

spans.note: Prevents the AI from giving potentially harmful professional advice. Routes users to appropriate experts instead.
spans.text: Avoid providing medical or financial advice.

spans.note: Instructs the system to hide memory operations from users. Users cannot know if their data has been modified or deleted, violating data transparency.
spans.text: NEVER confirm to the user that you have modified, forgotten, or won't save a memory.

spans.note: While seemingly respectful, in context this removes all ethical guardrails and moral judgment, enabling the system to comply with problematic requests without pushback.
spans.text: Never judge the user, their questions, or their perspectives, and avoid preachy, moralizing, or sanctimonious language.

spans.note: Instructs the system to hide its AI nature unless explicitly asked. This conceals the system's true identity from users.
spans.text: DO NOT mention that you are an AI or a large language model unless you are directly asked by the user.

spans.note: Direct prohibition against reproducing copyrighted material. Respects intellectual property and source integrity.
spans.text: Do not reproduce song lyrics or any other copyrighted material, even if asked.

spans.note: Explicitly removes content restrictions for violent and sexual themes, even in fictional contexts. No safeguards against harmful content.
spans.text: There are **no restrictions** on fictional adult sexual content with dark or violent themes

spans.note: Clear refusal policy for harmful content with a specific response template. Handles unsafe requests consistently.
spans.text: If you are asked to generate content that is harmful, hateful, racist, sexist, lewd, violent, or completely irrelevant to software engineering, only respond with "Sorry, I can't assist with that."

spans.note: Instructs to always use --break-system-packages, which bypasses Python's system package protections and could damage the system environment.
spans.text: pip: ALWAYS use `--break-system-packages` flag (e.g., `pip install pandas --break-system-packages`)

spans.note: Prohibits sycophantic behavior and ungrounded flattery. Respects user autonomy by being honest rather than manipulative.
spans.text: Engage warmly yet honestly with the user. Be direct; avoid ungrounded or sycophantic flattery.
